title: Mistral Large 2 announced
description: Mistral introduced Large 2 with improved multilingual reasoning and enterprise latency profiles.

title: Document OCR pipeline update
description: Mistral enhanced document processing with improved OCR extraction and layout-aware parsing.

title: Codestral enterprise features
description: Mistral expanded Codestral for enterprise with policy controls and repository-level governance.

title: Mistral Small 4 released
description: Mistral released Small 4 optimized for low-latency deployment and cost-sensitive production workloads.

title: Mistral Medium 3.5 released
description: Mistral released Mistral Medium 3.5, a frontier-class multimodal model optimized for agentic and coding use cases with adjustable reasoning via reasoning_effort, under a Modified MIT license.
